overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic downtown district. The character progresses from a tree-lined sidewalk into an enclosed graffiti-covered corridor before emerging into a busy commercial intersection with elevated highways and neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined downtown sidewalk with elevated highway approach

agents.ego_description: character in blue sleeveless shirt walking steadily along the sidewalk following the pedestrian flow

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking in same direction ahead on the right

entered.detail: tall building with large glowing digital billboard displaying colorful advertisements
futuristic elevated highway or monorail structure spanning across the street ahead
row of mature trees lining the right side of the sidewalk providing partial shade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit downtown sidewalk with a character walking forward. To the left, a building features a large neon billboard, while the right side is lined with trees. In the distance, an elevated highway structure looms over the street as pedestrians walk ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed pedestrian corridor with graffiti walls

events.description: sidewalk transitions from open tree-lined path to enclosed corridor with tall solid wall on right
brief visual obstruction crosses the lower portion of the frame

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward through the narrower enclosed section with graffiti-covered walls

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red hair walking directly ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: tall solid wall covered in large white and orange graffiti text and street art
storefront signs and awnings along the left side of the street

segments.scene_description: The environment becomes more enclosed as the trees give way to a tall graffiti-covered wall on the right. The elevated highway structure now dominates the left side of the frame, closer overhead. The lighting becomes more shadowed and diffused in this corridor section.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy commercial intersection with palm trees and elevated highway

events.description: exits enclosed corridor into open commercial plaza with palm trees and wider street
traffic light changes from red to green, vehicles begin moving

agents.ego_description: approaching and crossing the intersection as the traffic light changes, navigating through increased pedestrian traffic

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the right side of the widened street
large multi-story commercial building with glass facade and digital displays
marked pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt
bright neon signage on building facades advertising various businesses

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up into a bustling commercial intersection with palm trees and heavy pedestrian traffic. The elevated highway now passes directly overhead. The traffic light changes from red to green as the character crosses the street, surrounded by futuristic vehicles and bright neon signage on the surrounding buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, tree-lined sidewalk into a shadowed urban corridor before emerging into a vibrant commercial intersection. It begins on a sunlit downtown street where a character walks past a large neon billboard and rows of trees toward a distant elevated highway. As the character progresses, the environment becomes more enclosed, with the trees giving way to a tall graffiti-covered wall and the highway structure shifting to dominate the overhead space in diffused light. The scene then opens up into a bustling intersection filled with palm trees and heavy pedestrian traffic as the camera passes directly under the highway. Finally, the lighting brightens with vivid neon signage as the traffic light turns green and the character crosses the street amidst a flow of futuristic vehicles.
